offer: For construction contractors managing 5-15 job sites, inefficient progress reporting causes project delays. We automate photo conversion into reports instead of manual photo organization and reporting.
problem: Inefficient progress reporting from job site photos
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums for construction tools and resources
try_it: Let users try basic report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
